title.en: China-to-Eswatini Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入埃斯瓦蒂尼：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入埃斯瓦蒂尼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Eswatini SWASA conformity expectations, ESERA SSEG and net-metering licensing, EEC grid-connection review, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 grid-interconnection evidence, IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence, and Southern African NRS 097-2 style interconnection practice — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与埃斯瓦蒂尼SWASA合格评定预期、ESERA小规模嵌入式发电（SSEG）及净计量许可、EEC并网审查、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727并网证据、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据及南部非洲NRS 097-2式并网实践——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與埃斯瓦蒂尼SWASA合格評定預期、ESERA小規模嵌入式發電（SSEG）及淨計量許可、EEC併網審查、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727併網證據、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據及南部非洲NRS 097-2式併網實務——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SWASA conformity determination, ESERA licence approval, EEC grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Eswatini standards adoption, ESERA SSEG and net-metering rules, EEC connection conditions, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SWASA合格评定裁定、ESERA许可批准、EEC并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行埃斯瓦蒂尼标准采纳状况、ESERA SSEG及净计量规则、EEC接入条件和项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SWASA合格評定裁定、ESERA許可批准、EEC併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行埃斯瓦蒂尼標準採納狀況、ESERA SSEG及淨計量規則、EEC接入條件和項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Eswatini, the practical gates are: (1) SWASA conformity and any adopted IEC/SADC/SACU standard requirements; (2) ESERA approval or licensing for SSEG and net-metering projects; (3) EEC grid-connection review, commonly expected to align with Southern African NRS 097-2 style interconnection practice; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence; (5) IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 grid-interconnection evidence; and (6) IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence should not be treated as automatically accepted in Eswatini without supplementary IEC test reports and local utility confirmation.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口埃斯瓦蒂尼时，实际门槛包括：（1）SWASA合格评定及任何已采纳的IEC/SADC/SACU标准要求；（2）ESERA针对SSEG和净计量项目的批准或许可；（3）EEC并网审查，实践中通常预计会参考南部非洲NRS 097-2式并网要求；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（5）IEC 62116 / IEC 61727并网证据；（6）IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024证据不应在没有补充IEC测试报告和当地公用事业确认的情况下视为在埃斯瓦蒂尼自动被接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口埃斯瓦蒂尼時，實際門檻包括：（1）SWASA合格評定及任何已採納的IEC/SADC/SACU標準要求；（2）ESERA針對SSEG和淨計量項目的批准或許可；（3）EEC併網審查，實務中通常預計會參考南部非洲NRS 097-2式併網要求；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（5）IEC 62116 / IEC 61727併網證據；（6）IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024證據不應在沒有補充IEC測試報告和當地公用事業確認的情況下視為在埃斯瓦蒂尼自動被接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
